src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import path for ServerProperties to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.web.ServerProperties was removed in Spring Boot 3.2; using the old path causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import paths to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes DataSourceProperties, LiquibaseDataSource, and LiquibaseProperties have moved from org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure to org.springframework.boot.jdbc.autoconfigure and org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure respectively; using old paths causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with Environment.matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Profiles.of() is deprecated/removed in newer Spring versions; env.matchesProfiles() is the required replacement to avoid compile warnings or errors depending on strictness.
